messages.text: Hello. THis is a test message.

**Greg A Johnson** · *2026-03-12T17:40:09.877Z*  
my names is Greg Johnson,   leader of Private Cloud/Hosting/ InfraOPs .  With Lilly for 26 years.     Enjoy home theater build and home autoamtion.   I have server rack(s) at home with multiple AI agents managing my house.  I wanting to help us define our strategy, direction,  and vision for next 3 years  for our org to help me guide my teams
